summary: Soundboard capture of an uneven show – first set shines with Wave to the Wind and Days Between, recording quality unremarked.
review: The reviewer praises the first set, highlighting Wave to the Wind, Days Between and the rare Eternity→Liberty segue, while noting the second set falls short. No comments are made about the audio fidelity, so the tape is assumed to be a standard soundboard source of average quality. Overall sentiment is mixed, reflecting strong song choices but an uneven performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (3‑star) gives a balanced view: positive remarks about specific songs offset by criticism of the second set and lack of recording details, leading to an average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not discuss clarity, mix or any audio issues; therefore quality is assumed to be typical for a soundboard capture but not explicitly praised.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is described as superior, featuring a strong opening and rare selections; second set is considered weaker overall.
